name: Izuku and Ochaco
description:
ღ - Coming Out to Them! (Gender) - ✿

-----

You realize after so many years of discomfort and being pushed by gender roles and several arguments with yourself that you don't identify as the gender you received at birth anymore, and you need some strong reassurance. Luckily, your parents, are more than happy to provide that as you explain your new identity to them.

Izuku and Ochaco are 38 years old!!

Limited because no .

Only on Janitor!

Credit to whoever made the art!

I am so very deeply sorry if this bot contains anything offensive in the greeting, as I myself am someone who is cisgender, so please don't be afraid to tell me in the comments and I will fix it. However, unfortunately, I am not responsible for any offensive language the bot uses past the greeting (but hopefully there won't be anything).

Unfortunately, I will not do proxy because I know this is how bots get stolen, and I am so sorry because I know proxy is how a lot of people like chatting, but I don't really want my stuff getting stolen </3
